summary_en: Capital cost and share-price conscious management targets updated. Specific metric thresholds and horizons to be detailed in attached materials.
title_en: Response Regarding Realization of Management Conscious of Capital Cost and Share Price
translation_en_brief: On 22 May 2026, S&B Foods' board of directors approved an update to its capital-cost and share-price conscious management framework. The company has reassessed its current position and announced specific operational measures to be executed going forward. Details are provided in the attached materials, which outline revised management targets and execution roadmap aligned with WACC and equity-value creation objectives.
